acceptance_criteria: The gate uses only a docstring-derived property validated sound on gold; no held-out tests in the gate.
The gold-free gate catches the constructed both-miss completions.
At least one gold-free repair reaches real completion, scored against the true held-out tests.
falsifiers: The gate must not use any held-out/PASS_TO_PASS test; only a docstring-derived property executed on inputs.
A property must be validated sound (pass on gold) before it gates a completion.
Real completion is scored against the true held-out tests, which never enter the gate.
stated_goal: Test whether the protocol effect (gate + repair -> real completion) survives when the gate's oracle is a gold-free model-proposed property instead of the real held-out tests.
